name: @forgeax/bevy-time-elapsed
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `time` example (behavior keyed to absolute elapsed time) — a MOTION demo exercising the new Time resource `elapsed` field (accumulated seconds since start, mapping Bevy Time::elapsed_secs), driving a cube that oscillates as sin(elapsed) via createApp's managed frame-loop + a world.addSystem Update system.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: time-elapsed demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: time-elapsed demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy time reproduction
